menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Every platter is crafted with care from the finest fresh fruits

platter.name: Fruit Platter
platter.description: A luxurious arrangement of the finest carefully selected fresh fruits, presented artistically to delight the eyes and the palate.

ship.name: Fruit Ship
ship.description: A spectacular 1-meter long fruit ship — perfect for celebrations and large events. A stunning visual display with generous portions.

sushi.name: Fruit Sushi
sushi.description: Creative fruit sushi rolls made with fresh fruits, combining beauty and wonderful flavor in every bite.

fakhfakhina.name: Fakhfakhina
fakhfakhina.description: Rich fruit cocktail with fresh fruit chunks, topped with a delicious scoop of ice cream and optional add-ons.
